title: Dogfood per-job runner config layered review
goal: Run ordered multi-model review layers for the per-job runner/model configuration work in one declared workflow.

decisions.title: Single durable review workflow
decisions.rationale: Use one saved multi-phase workflow instead of serial one-off review launches so dogfood exercises declared phases, phase-level runner overrides, and per-job runner/model config.

decisions.title: Rotating model order
decisions.rationale: @mm3 already caught and fixed the structural launch-provider bug in an accidental exploratory pass, so this workflow uses @glm51 for deeper semantic review and @mimo25p for final regression review.

phases.name: semantic-review
phases.title: Semantic Review
phases.goal: Deep review of the mm3-fixed per-job runner configuration implementation.

jobs.name: glm51-semantic-review
jobs.prompt:
You are already running as the ccc @glm51 review worker. Do not run ccc, do not spawn/delegate to another agent, and do not say you will use ccc @glm51. Work in the current cwd.

Review the current branch containing commits 150939c and c8b9e6e for per-job runner/model configuration. @mm3 already fixed a bug where state metadata changed but actual launched commands still used the default provider. Your job is a deeper semantic review: check CLI precedence, root/phase/job merge behavior, actual worker launch behavior, dry-run/mock behavior, timeout/result extraction with per-job providers, ccc vs codex-direct vs ccc-opencode interactions, serialization of execution args into agent state, docs consistency, and test coverage.

If you find concrete bugs, fix them narrowly and commit with message: fix(workflow): address glm51 per-job runner review. If there are no concrete bugs, do not commit.

Run focused tests relevant to any findings. Prefer process-level assertions over metadata-only assertions where launch behavior matters.

Return strict JSON with keys: status (pass|fixed|blocked), findings (array of objects with severity, file, line, issue, fix), tests (array of command/result), commits (array), notes.

phases.name: final-review
phases.title: Final Regression Review
phases.goal: Final consistency and regression review after semantic review.

jobs.name: mimo25p-final-review
jobs.prompt:
You are already running as the ccc @mimo25p final review worker. Do not run ccc, do not spawn/delegate to another agent, and do not say you will use ccc @mimo25p. Work in the current cwd.

Final review the current branch after previous implementation/review commits. Focus on regression risk, tests, documentation, and whether the per-job runner/model feature is understandable and maintainable. Check that the declared layered review workflow itself exercises phase-level ccc_runner overrides correctly.

If you find concrete issues, fix narrowly and commit with message: fix(workflow): address final per-job runner review. If there are no concrete issues, do not commit.

Run at minimum the focused per-job runner tests and, if practical, WORKFLOW_TEST_MODE=fast python3 tests/test_workflow.py.

Return strict JSON with keys: status (pass|fixed|blocked), findings (array of objects with severity, file, line, issue, fix), tests (array of command/result), commits (array), notes.
